ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital output */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the digital output */,
  "output_type" INTEGER /* Type of the digital output (e.g., raw data set, enhanced data set, documentation, processing steps, visualizations) */,
  "format_duration_size" TEXT /* Format, duration, and size of the digital output */,
  "planned_access" TEXT /* Planned access and storage locations for the digital output */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the output */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source where the data was originally obtained */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the output */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the output is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_outputs_output_type FOREIGN KEY ("output_type") REFERENCES output_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the output type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the output type was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the output type is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storage location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the storage location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the storage location was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the storage location is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage link */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital output */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the storage link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the storage link was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default storage location for the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_storage_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES digital_outputs ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_storage_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES storage_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital output */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the digital output */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the current version */,
  "version_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the version for integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES digital_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing step */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital output */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the script used for processing */,
  "script_description" TEXT /* Description of the processing step */,
  "script_file" TEXT /* File path to the script */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the processing step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the processing step was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the processing step is active */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* JSON array of dependencies for the processing step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_steps_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES digital_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital output */,
  "vis_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "vis_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "vis_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the visualization is active */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* JSON array of dependencies for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES digital_outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital output being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the digital output */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the digital output was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the output */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the output */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES digital_outputs ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital output */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata field */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the metadata entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_metadata_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES digital_outputs ("output_id")
)
